'''chadushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:llautu|llautu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:llautu|llautu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chadushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chædishith|chædishith]] || [[word:chædishij|chædishij]] || [[word:chædishish|chædishish]] || [[word:chædishi|chædishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chadudushuth|chadudushuth]] || [[word:chadudushuj|chadudushuj]] || [[word:chadudushush|chadudushush]] || [[word:chadudushu|chadudushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chadushuth|chadushuth]] || [[word:chadushuj|chadushuj]] || [[word:chadushush|chadushush]] || [[word:chadushu|chadushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chadufshuth|chadufshuth]] || [[word:chadufshuj|chadufshuj]] || [[word:chadufshush|chadufshush]] || [[word:chadufshuf|chadufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chadushuthu|chadushuthu]] || [[word:chadushuju|chadushuju]] || [[word:chadushushu|chadushushu]] || [[word:chadushuku|chadushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chadushuth|chadushuth]] || [[word:chadushuj|chadushuj]] || [[word:chadushush|chadushush]] || [[word:chadushu|chadushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chadushuthul|chadushuthul]] || [[word:chadushujul|chadushujul]] || [[word:chadushushul|chadushushul]] || [[word:chadushukul|chadushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chadushuthuthu|chadushuthuthu]] || [[word:chadushujuju|chadushujuju]] || [[word:chadushushushu|chadushushushu]] || [[word:chadushuku|chadushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chadushuthun|chadushuthun]] || [[word:chadushujun|chadushujun]] || [[word:chadushushun|chadushushun]] || [[word:chadushukun|chadushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chadushuthuoro|chadushuthuoro]] || [[word:chadushujuoro|chadushujuoro]] || [[word:chadushushuoro|chadushushuoro]] || [[word:chadushukuoro|chadushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
